title: Auditable bypass preserves structural integrity
body: The K520.7 bypass does NOT weaken Rule 001 — it makes every bypass visible. Auditability IS the integrity guarantee. An append-only audit log at ~/.lb-session/test_mode_audit.jsonl means Founder can inspect every tool call that was allowed without substrate. The act of logging is the structural discipline.

title: Double-key design prevents accidental production activation
body: The bypass requires BOTH an authority file on disk (written by the generator) AND a matching token in the shell environment. Neither alone grants access. This makes accidental activation nearly impossible — you'd have to both run the generator AND set the env var, which is deliberate Founder action. Auto-expire after 1 hour prevents forgotten active sessions.

title: SHA-256 pre-image design: token on env-var, hash on disk
body: Store sha256(token) in the authority file, not the token itself. Env var carries the raw token. Gate recomputes sha256(env_var) and compares to stored hash. This means: (1) reading the authority file doesn't give you bypass ability — you still need the matching token; (2) the token never touches persistent disk storage in readable form. Security property: pre-image resistance of SHA-256 protects the token at rest.

title: PowerShell Get-Date -UFormat %s returns LOCAL time, not UTC epoch
body: When writing test scripts that compare timestamps with Python time.time() (which returns UTC epoch), do NOT use PowerShell Get-Date -UFormat %s — it returns local time (UTC-5 in CDT), giving timestamps ~18000s behind Python. Use Python to generate the timestamp instead: python -c 'import time; print(int(time.time()))'. The K520.5 report documented the inverse (clock skew 6h ahead); K520.7 test exposed the 5h-behind variant.

title: Test-mode bypass as empirical-measurement infrastructure, not exception
body: K520.7 reframes the bypass: it's not a weakening of the rule, it's purpose-built empirical-measurement infrastructure. Just as a scientific experiment needs a control condition, the Substrate Savings empirical study (Penny Saved paper Section 5) needs a measured WITHOUT-substrate baseline. The bypass enables that baseline measurement in a controlled, audited, time-limited way. After the measurement, Rule 001 is exactly as strong as before.
